keyPoints: R is a programming language for data analysis
R uses R Studio or R Console to initiate
Packages are libraries that add functionality
Environments are working spaces for R
Functions are blocks of reusable code
Flow control statements decide the program flow
Loops repeat a task multiple times
Basic data types in R include numeric, character, and logical
Vectors are lists of data of the same type
Install packages using install.packages() and load packages using library()
